## Chapter/Section

Which spec chapter and section this relates to (e.g., Chapter 3, Section "Reference Resolution").

## Issue

Describe the inconsistency, ambiguity, or gap.

## Example

```vera
```

## Suggested Resolution (optional)

If you have a proposed fix or clarification.
